warning: An algorithm can be correct relative to a harmful or incomplete specification.
mitigation: Audit objective, postcondition, and downstream use.
responsible_interpretation_note: formal correctness, specification quality, and social consequences are separate review layers

warning: A hidden precondition can invalidate the proof in production.
responsible_interpretation_note: formal correctness, specification quality, and social consequences are separate review layers

warning: Shortest path depends entirely on edge-weight meaning.
mitigation: Document whether weight means distance, time, cost, risk, or priority.
responsible_interpretation_note: formal correctness, specification quality, and social consequences are separate review layers

warning: Passing tests may be mistaken for proof.
mitigation: Distinguish test evidence from correctness argument.
responsible_interpretation_note: formal correctness, specification quality, and social consequences are separate review layers

warning: A formally correct graph algorithm may be applied to a poorly modeled network.
mitigation: Audit graph construction, edge semantics, and missing data.
responsible_interpretation_note: formal correctness, specification quality, and social consequences are separate review layers

warning: Priority ordering can encode questionable values while preserving heap correctness.
mitigation: Review priority criteria and affected stakeholders.
